name: Enter the Azure Cloud Sect
description: Pass the outer disciple trial and reach the safety of the outer sect path.
steps: Reach the Azure Cloud mountain gate.
Survive the stone tablet trial.
Learn the Azure Cloud Breathing Method.
Complete your first guided training.
Face the mist wolf on the outer path.
Prepare for the first real bottleneck.

name: First Sect Task
description: Complete a simple assignment from the outer sect hall.
steps: Accept a task from the assignment hall.
Gather frost-vein herbs from the lower grove.

name: Old Ren's Stance Test
description: Earn a retired caravan guard's correction before the sect exam.
steps: Ask Old Ren to judge your mortal forms.
Hold your stance under pressure.
Receive Old Ren's correction.

name: Aunt Lin's Medicine Task
description: Help the herbalist prepare medicine without poisoning anyone through pride.
steps: Offer help at Aunt Lin's herb table.
Prepare a stable mortal medicine.
Learn how medicine leaves traces in the body.

name: Guo's Honest Iron
description: Prove you can repair something plain before dreaming of immortal weapons.
steps: Ask Blacksmith Guo for a forge lesson.
Temper flawed iron without ruining it.
Learn what honest work can teach the body.

name: Mei's Three Breaths
description: Learn the shrine keeper's breathing count before the mountain tests your heart.
steps: Visit Shrine Keeper Mei.
Match breath to incense smoke.
Carry a steadier breath toward the sect road.

name: Grove Boundary Watch
description: Walk the lower grove boundary markers before dark and report anything disturbed or unusual to the hall steward.
steps: Accept the patrol task from the board.
Walk the grove boundary before sundown.
Report back to the assignment hall.

name: Medicine Garden Weeding
description: Pull overgrown weeds from the lower medicine garden terraces without damaging the roots.
steps: Accept the weeding task from the board.
Work through the lower terrace without rushing.

name: Clean Hands, Clean Roots
description: Earn the medicine senior sister's trust by doing patient preparation work before asking for recipe instruction.
steps: Gain the senior sister's notice through careful garden work.
Sort medicinal materials without rushing.
Receive practical medicine recipes.

name: Medicine For The Wall
description: Ask the bottleneck elder for preparation that keeps future breakthroughs from damaging your foundation.
steps: Show enough foundation control to be worth instructing.
Copy the stabilizing decoction pattern.
Remember that survival medicine is not the same as raw strength.

name: The Broken Trade Route
description: Investigate trouble on the village road and find out why ordinary bandits are afraid of something above them.
steps: Hear how the road has gone bad.
Choose how to help: fight, listen, repair, or heal.
Find a thread leading toward the immortal world.

name: What The Token Points To
description: The bronze token from the trade road has been pulling north since you woke. Something underground is calling it home.
steps: Find what the black-thread token is pointing toward north of the broken trade road.
Navigate the Black-Thread Hollow and reach its inner ward.
Confront the cultist at the formation's centre and end the siphon.

name: Eastern Terrace Bounty
description: A spirit boar has been tearing through the eastern crop terraces outside Iron Bridge Town. The notice board has a bounty posted under an Azure Cloud Sect seal.
steps: Find the spirit boar at the eastern crop terraces.
Clear the terrace and collect the reward.

name: Luo's Salvage Work
description: Help Luo Jiwei sort useful salvage from junk so he trusts you with practical crafting patterns.
steps: Offer to work beside Luo's anvil.
Sort salvage by what can hold pressure.
Earn Luo's first practical correction.
